title: A Walk in the Rain
content: Lucas and Mia were walking through the park when dark clouds covered the sky. A few seconds later, rain started to fall. They laughed instead of running away. Their shoes became wet, and their hair was full of raindrops. Mia opened a small umbrella, but it was too small for both of them. They stayed close together and continued walking. The rain made everything quiet and peaceful. When the sun appeared again, Lucas smiled and said, “I think rainy days are my favorite now.” Mia knew exactly why.
